@andriy_mulyar there's a whole section in my forest that's just riddled with one-shot infographic studio tools and the decaying remnants of a million content marketing plans

sometimes you spend 3 years playing with a technology, then suddenly it goes super-viral and your new field is now full of hucksters, hustlers, and conmen who cargo-cult all of the early successes and flood the market with filth, and it's at this point I go to the forest
